data.title: Azure DevOps Pipelines First-Class Support: CI template generation and gate integration
data.description: Placeholder epic for adding Azure DevOps Pipelines as a first-class supported CI platform in DSO. Scope includes CI template generation for Azure Pipelines YAML, onboarding detection of azure-pipelines.yml, architect-foundation scaffolding for Azure DevOps pipeline structure, and gate script integration (lint, test, review) adapted for Azure Pipelines triggers and stages. Currently DSO only supports GitHub Actions.
